chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1493 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 12716/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 01.12.2016. Petitioner present in person. Mr. Amjad Ali Sahito, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. Mr. Amjad Ali Sahito learned Counsel representing respondent No.4 submits that numbers of FIRs have been lodged against son of petitioner in respect of carrying narcotics, details of which has been given in the annexures filed with their objections to the present petition. He further states that trial is going on in respect of these FIRs before the concerned Court of Special Judge (Narcotics). He further denies the allegation of causing any harassment to the petitioner by the respondent. In view of the above undisputed factual position, present petition is de void of merits, however, on the undertaking of respondents that they will act strictly in accordance with law without causing any harassment to the petitioner, the same stands disposed of. JUDGE
